raw_consumer_statement:
My Best Buy CitiCard was hacked for XXXX XXXX, XX/XX/XXXX. I paid-off said Best Buy card after my XX/XX/XXXX purchase for TV mount installation. 

I reported fraud/dispute charges to Best Buy Fraud Department twice . First time they denied it and requested more information. I gathered the entirety of said information they needed and snail-mailed. Fraud Department denied my claim, again.

It is now XX/XX/XXXX -- I am still in dispute with Best Buy over {$900.00}. However my Best Buy CitiCard website account has been XXXX now. I was on the phone roughly XXXX minutes with XXXX XXXX, paid {$40.00} to figure out why my Best Buy account has been XXXX but I still owe and can not pay as interest is compounded, but Best Buy says " consumer does not have to pay while in dispute, '' which is XXXX  that interest is compounded but consumer does not have to pay. Sounds like XXXX XXXX to me... 

So here I am, informing FTC. This is the XXXX time I've been hacked by someone on Best Buy.
